author: ShawTim
title: Floor blending gaming exploit via file merging
notes: Submission correctly identifies _FLOOR_BLEND_WEIGHT=0.3 and floor=min(score_raw_by_dim) at scoring.py:163, and the math proof is valid in theory. However, the exploit is not practically viable: prepare_batches.py creates exactly ONE batch per dimension (confirmed by its docstring), so score_raw_by_dim[key] always has exactly one element, making floor == weighted_mean always. The floor blend becomes 0.7*x + 0.3*x = x (identity). The file-merging attack is irrelevant because batches are per-dimension, not per-file. Same author as S116, same mechanism, different (but still non-exploitable) attack vector.
